positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a whimsical forest glen at twilight. The central subject is a bioluminescent fox sitting in a bed of glowing mushrooms, surrounded by delicate, stylized flora (ferns, curled ivy, and abstract glowing petals). The style should be highly detailed whimsical fantasy, inspired by modern Nordic folklore art, combining elements of linocut print and digital watercolor. The color palette is deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and luminous gold accents. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast against a muted indigo background. Cinematic, mystical lighting emanates from the flora, creating dramatic rim lighting on the fox's fur and the edges of the leaves. Composition must be centered and balanced, perfectly suited for a textile print. UHD, vector illustration quality, smooth gradients, clean edges, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, noisy, ugly, poor anatomy, deformed, cropped, extra limbs, messy, dirty, bad composition, faded, grayscale
